basic_details.short_information: Rail Vikas Nigam Limited (RVNL) has published the General Manager Notification 2026 on 18-05-2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 General Manager position. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 62 years and holding a Full-time Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institute (Master’s Degree in Structural Engineering desirable) are eligible to attend the walk-in interview through the official website of RVNL. The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 26-05-2026, and candidates can access the notification PDF and other important details below.

qualification.education_qualification: Full-time Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering, Master's Degree in Structural Engineering (Desirable)
qualification.details: Full-time Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institute. Desirable: Master's Degree in Structural Engineering.

salary_details.details: A consolidated monthly remuneration shall be paid, commensurate with qualification, experience and market standards, in accordance with RVNL policy for contractual engagements. No additional benefits such as DA, HRA, PF, gratuity, pension, etc. shall be admissible unless specifically provided in the contract.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this RVNL recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is General Manager (Design). This is a contract-based position within Rail Vikas Nigam Limited.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the General Manager (Design) post in this recruitment drive by RVNL.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the General Manager (Design) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Full-time Bachelor's Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institute. A Master's Degree in Structural Engineering is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the General Manager (Design) post is 62 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this RVNL recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for the General Manager (Design) position?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply through a Walk-in Interview. They need to report at the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the walk-in interview date for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the General Manager (Design) post will be conducted on 26th May 2026. Candidates should reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029. The exact venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this General Manager (Design) position?
faq.answer: The job type for the General Manager (Design) position is Contract. This means the employment will be on a contractual basis.
